title: ClickPearl
description: Throws an ender pearl when you press a bind
body:
ClickPearl is a lightweight and convenient mod that lets you throw ender pearls with a single keybind, without needing to hold them in your hand.

✨ Features:

Assigns an ender pearl to a custom keybind, making usage faster and more convenient.

Throws pearls directly from your inventory or hotbar (no need to manually switch slots).

Perfect for PvP, building, and quick movement.

Fully compatible with other Fabric mods for Minecraft 1.16.5.

🎮 Why download:

If you frequently use ender pearls in the game—whether for combat or mobility—this mod saves time and frees up your hands. No more scrolling to the right slot: just press the key, and the pearl flies!
